highlights: Agentic systems are rapidly shifting from general-purpose assistants to highly specialized, autonomous operational forces, driven by new enterprise-grade governance frameworks and structured feedback loops.

Unified architectures like ITNet are challenging the historical division between Convolution, Attention, and Recurrence, proving that a single learnable integral transform can synthesize these distinct inductive biases.

The tools landscape is maturing quickly with OpenAI's acquisition of Ona for persistent agent cloud environments, alongside the emergence of agent-optimized CLIs and standardized Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

agents.title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
agents.summary: Introduces AgenticRei, a runtime policy engine enabling developers to enforce strict security, compliance, and multi-step obligation policies entirely outside the LLM using a high-performance logic engine.

agents.title: DeXposure-Claw: An Agentic System for DeFi Risk Supervision
agents.summary: A production-grade risk supervision framework combining graph foundation models and deterministic guards to deploy low-latency, auditable agentic workflows in complex financial domains.

agents.title: Uncertainty Decomposition for Clarification Seeking in LLM Agents
agents.summary: A zero-shot, prompt-based uncertainty method that allows autonomous agents to detect underspecified tasks and proactively seek clarification, preventing catastrophic silent failures.

models.title: ITNet: A Learnable Integral Transform That Subsumes Convolution, Attention, and Recurrence
models.summary: Introduces a unified architecture that models convolutions, self-attention, and state-space recurrences as special cases of a learnable integral transform, matching specialized modality models.

models.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
models.summary: An open-weight model optimized specifically for complex, long-horizon developer tasks and extended reasoning workflows.

models.title: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis
models.summary: Systematically benchmarks Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) against 8 reasoning/coding tasks, charting precise trade-offs between iterative denoising steps and computational efficiency.

tools.title: Predicting Model Behavior Before Release by Simulating Deployment
tools.summary: Introduces OpenAI's Deployment Simulation pipeline, which models user interactions with pre-release LLMs to accurately predict post-deployment safety and functional issues.

tools.title: Designing the hf CLI as an Agent-Optimized Way to Work with the Hub
tools.summary: Redesigns Hugging Face's command-line interface with machine-readable outputs and agent-friendly commands, allowing autonomous AI agents to seamlessly fetch, upload, and update models.

tools.title: Toten: Knowledge-Based Ontological Tokenization Of Physical Quantities
tools.summary: A structured, ontological tokenizer that replaces statistically blind Byte-Pair Encoding for engineering numbers and physical units, ensuring flawless numerical reconstruction.

companies.title: OpenAI to Acquire Ona
companies.summary: OpenAI announces its plan to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents to run reliably across enterprise workflows.

companies.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
companies.summary: OpenAI launches a $150M partner initiative aimed at helping global enterprise system integrators, consultants, and builders scale and deploy large-scale AI automation safely.

companies.title: AMIE: Conversational Medical AI Matches PCPs in Nature Study
companies.summary: Google's conversational healthcare AI system demonstrates primary-care level accuracy and management in a newly published Nature study on complex disease management.

learning.title: New OpenAI Academy Courses for the Next Era of Work
learning.summary: Practical, workflow-driven learning pathways designed to teach builders how to configure repeatable agentic structures and deploy them to production.

learning.title: Profiling in PyTorch: From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
learning.summary: A deep-dive technical guide that teaches developers how to profile neural networks, analyze memory overhead, and write custom fused MLP kernels for maximum hardware performance.

learning.title: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces
learning.summary: A hands-on guide showing developers how to build autonomous agent loops that orchestrate and chain multiple isolated Hugging Face Spaces to generate complex assets.
